title: fMRI Can't Read Your Thoughts
script_summary: Exploring the limitations of fMRI technology in understanding human thoughts.

segments.voiceover: Can fMRI really read your mind?
Functional MRI scans map brain activity, but they have serious limitations.
The resolution is low, meaning details are blurry and hard to interpret.
Studies show group maps can't pinpoint individual thoughts.
So, while fMRI is powerful, it’s not a mind-reading machine. It reveals patterns, not secrets.
Curious about more brain science? Hit like and follow for deeper dives!
